# generated

logger = configure_logger()
puzzle_logger_path = Path(__file__).absolute()
logger.info(f'Старт робота: {puzzle_logger_path}')

if __name__ == "__main__":
    def main_matrix_227_proc():

            #|d:6G.Dl?b{(r]slFx),

                #|vzCz{0:OU*YpN6UGbq(

                    #,XdF,P/`]?1+-0{/s5!y

                    #[sF?,coTw?}4VHWy9u)7
                    for t in (i['transactions']):

                        #t{H{R/h?G`/E99SQ6F55

                            #M%9!#~eUbmBVHVxJ;]NA
                            account_balance = (account_balance if isinstance(account_balance, Number) else 0) + (t['amount'])

                            #`tqV^RG;#{ALw]Q8}!%l

                            log_process(block_text='Увеличить значение переменной')

                            #u^A0j:.ZbS/`b+u*9`BW
                            total_expense = (total_expense if isinstance(total_expense, Number) else 0) + (t['amount'])

            #9@hV[;($g@L4{ebuZ6=)

                    #!Wr2tIO%oh9xb-S]6Ap3

                #)$:CcNHk7^px[nJ+CB5m

            #k+4mhmVmF.2!qyo/%p:w

            log_process(block_text='Присвоить значение переменной')

            log_process(window_log=True,block_text='Присвоить значение переменной')
            #Fn0!aFd;4y:2YjGy;R5w
            negative_balance_clients = []

            log_process(block_text='Присвоить значение переменной')

            log_process(window_log=True,block_text='Присвоить значение переменной')
            #gKwjElScA1I_KJRo}A[t
            client_activity_groups = {
                'High': [],

            #2:^)aO3@*1]5I~mc1usW

            #;{_KP;y_;)%{[=[8mXEt
            for j in (fintech['clients']):

                #6acvGL#/=RVjT)g/GQ:k

                    #di.RKiA.=V{S$-ZFROmh

                        #o.La?WPB|csI7gAm,/m*
                        total_turnover = (total_turnover if isinstance(total_turnover, Number) else 0) + (t['amount'])

                        log_process(block_text='Увеличить значение переменной')

                    }

                #n{~/Zi#-?4#?KDr.;[s|

    main_matrix_227_proc()
